name: Chinese Duck Sauce
recipeIngredient: 5 cups mixed peeled, chopped fruit (apples, pears, peaches, and/or plums)
optional: up to 1/2 tsp. crushed red pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a medium-sized saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat and let it simmer uncovered until all the fruit is very soft, which may take about 30 minutes or longer.
4. Allow the sauce to cool thoroughly before refrigerating.
